description: My School 2.0 brings full compatibility with Apple's latest operating systems, a stunning Liquid Glass redesign, and powerful new Apple Intelligence features.

features.description: Now fully compatible with iOS 26, iPadOS 26, watchOS 26, visionOS 26, macOS 26, and tvOS 26.
Refreshed the user interface with a stunning new Liquid Glass design.
Dynamic gradient background on the Home tab that changes with the time of day.
Updated app icons to match the new Liquid Glass aesthetic.
Leveraging Apple Intelligence, My School can now summarise subject, assignment, and other entry descriptions — even offline.
Introducing AI Guide — a built-in assistant that offers intelligent tips, suggestions, and tailored guidance for your assignments and entries, powered by Apple Intelligence.
Live Activity support added — track your current session directly from the Lock Screen, Dynamic Island, and StandBy mode.
Set any location as your school directly from the map interface.
Customise the colour scheme in the macOS app.
Added support for quickly viewing session details on Apple TV.
New Mental Wellbeing feature offers insights and support suggestions based on your school activity.
General performance improvements and bug fixes.

description: This update contains important bug fixes and performance improvements.

features.description: General performance improvements and bug fixes.

description: This update contains important bug fixes and performance improvements.

features.description: General performance improvements and bug fixes.

description: My School 2.1 is a major refinement update focused on clarity, smarter insights, and better cross-device integration.

features.description: The Settings Page has been redesigned to have a clearer and more consistent appearance across all platforms.
All new Grading System allows you to choose and set preferred grading rule from 6 most used grading systems around the world with more to come in the future.
Migration Guide helps you upgrade your data to the latest framework.
New Apple Intelligence features help you understand your performance even better.
Apple Intelligence powered mental wellbeing suggestions make reflection easier like never before.
Redesigned Wellbeing tab makes it a better wellness center for recording and discovering.
Introducing refreshed, compact design of the Home Tab Top Bar showing all the essential information at a glance, with details available in popovers.

More advanced search function allows you to search subjects and entries via Spotlight right from the home screen. With the updated in-app search function, you can now easily find entries or subjects by searching a wider range of keywords.
Ability to convert entries to different categories.
New languages have been added. My School is now available in English, Chinese, French, German, Hindi, Italian, Japanese, Korean, and Spanish.
WAM calculator is added to your performance report.
Added Siri Shortcuts — now you can ask Siri about your next assignment, exam, and more.
View upcoming entries right from your home screen, watch face or space with widgets.
All your notifications now sync across all your devices, and tapping on a notification directs you to the detail page.
Now you can add weight to each entry's marks.
You can now add location information, attachments, and more to all kinds of entries.
Support for the new windowing system on iPadOS 26.
Your personal profile now syncs across devices via iCloud.
More and refreshed Home Tab backgrounds.
Added more pointer hovering effects for a better mouse and trackpad experience.
Ability to set your preferred temperature unit for weather conditions.
You can now translate Wellbeing articles to your preferred language.
Various UI refinements for a cleaner, more consistent experience.
General performance improvements and bug fixes.

description: This update introduces Lock Screen widgets, a more advanced marking system, and important bug fixes and performance improvements across the app.

features.description: Redesigned Smart Brief for clearer visuals and improved readability.
New Lock Screen widgets let you quickly view upcoming assignments, sessions, and more at a glance.
Advanced marking system improvements provide more flexible and accurate performance tracking.
New animation when Apple Intelligence is responding.
Add support to version 27 os releases.
General performance improvements and bug fixes.
